channel.title: briefUpdatesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: U.S. contractor who allegedly stole $46 million of crypto arrested, FBI says
item.description: John Daghita was arrested on the island of Saint Martin, FBI Director Kash Patel said.

item.title: Pentagon formally designates Anthropic a supply chain risk amid feud over AI guardrails
item.description: The U.S. military has formally designated artificial intelligence firm Anthropic a supply chain risk, sources told CBS News, a sweeping move that coul...

item.title: LIVE: ABC News Live
item.description: 24/7 coverage of breaking news and live events

item.title: House primed to vote on Iran war powers resolution
item.description: Passage of the resolution will likely depend on House turnout.

item.title: Trump says he must have a role in choosing Iran's next leader as war expands
item.description: President Trump said he must have a role in choosing Iran's next leader and called the son of the late Ayatollah Ali Khamenei "unacceptable."

item.title: Jury deliberating at sex trafficking trial of the Alexander brothers, real estate’s ‘A Team’
Watch Live: Pete Hegseth, Adm. Brad Cooper give news conference
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth will give a press briefing with Admiral Brad Cooper, the commander of U.S. Central Command.

item.title: Videos from officers show terrifying moments during Texas mass shooting that left 3 dead
Trump fires DHS secretary Kristi Noem, replaces her with Sen. Markwayne Mullin
item.description: Earlier, sources said Trump called Republicans asking if he should fire her.

item.title: MrBeast's company fired video editor after Kalshi accused employee of insider trading
item.description: A MrBeast video editor has been fired after accusations of insider trading by Kalshi

item.title: WATCH: Senator helps remove protester during Senate hearing
item.description: Montana Sen. Tim Sheehy was filmed in a confrontation with a protester during a hearing on Capitol Hill Wednesday and assisted officers with his remov...

item.title: Suspect in custody in Colorado in the case of 3 women found dead in Utah
item.description: A man who authorities accuse of killing a southern Utah woman, stealing her vehicle and driving it to a nearby trailhead and killing two women who wer...

item.title: Record share of Americans are tapping 401(k)s for hardship withdrawals
item.description: More Americans are digging into their retirement savings for emergency expenses, research from Vanguard shows.
